title: scrophularia stiriaca
intro: Scrophularia stiriaca, also known as Alpine Figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia stiriaca include its potential to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Scrophularia stiriaca is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
